name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-13
title: No test verifies invariant 4 (Agent response JSON schema)
description: Spec invariant 4 specifies the Agent response schema {features: [...], rationale: 'one sentence'}. No test or validator exists. Add a schema-validation helper that the caller can use to verify the Agent's response, and a test that runs it against representative example responses (valid + malformed).

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-14 (no test for Inv 4), fixed by PR #118
